name: writemark-editor
description: Writemark is a dependency-free live inline Markdown editor web component with slash commands, smart editing, form integration, source fallback, and no built-in toolbar.

scripts.check: node scripts/build.mjs --check && node --check src/writemark-editor.js && node --check dist/writemark-editor.js && node --check dist/writemark-editor.global.js && node --check dist/md-live-editor.js && node --check scripts/demo-controls.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/build.mjs
